name: Star-Lord
text: Each ally you control gains the [[guardian]] trait. "What could go wrong?" — Interrupt: When you play a card from your hand, deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card → reduce the cost to play that card by 3. (Limit once per round.)
real_text: Each ally you control gains the [[guardian]] trait. "What could go wrong?" — Interrupt: When you play a card from your hand, deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card → reduce the cost to play that card by 3. (Limit once per round.)

linked_card.name: Peter Quill
linked_card.text:
Setup: Search your deck and discard pile for a copy of the Element Gun upgrade and add it to your hand.

Smooth Talker — Action: Choose a card in your hand. Swap that card with the top card of your deck. (Limit once per round.)
linked_card.real_text: Setup: Search your deck and discard pile for a copy of the Element Gun upgrade and add it to your hand. Smooth Talker — Action: Choose a card in your hand. Swap that card with the top card of your deck. (Limit once per round.)

name: Nova Prime
text: Response: After you play Nova Prime from your hand, defeat a non-[[elite]] minion.
real_text: Response: After you play Nova Prime from your hand, defeat a non-[[elite]] minion.

name: Daring Escape
text: Hero Action Deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card → ready your hero and draw 1 card.
real_text: Hero Action Deal yourself 1 facedown encounter card → ready your hero and draw 1 card.
flavor: "Okay, not to brag, but that was probably the bravest thing that any one of us has ever done." —Star-Lord

name: Gutsy Move
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme. Remove 2 additional threat from that scheme for each facedown encounter card in front of you.
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme. Remove 2 additional threat from that scheme for each facedown encounter card in front of you.

name: Sliding Shot
text: Play only if you control an Element Gun. Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy. Deal 2 additional damage to that enemy for each facedown encounter card in front of you.
real_text: Play only if you control an Element Gun. Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy. Deal 2 additional damage to that enemy for each facedown encounter card in front of you.

name: Bad Boy
text: Hero Interrupt When you would take any amount of damage from the villain's attack, discard this card → prevent all of that damage. Change to alter-ego form and draw 2 cards.
real_text: Hero Interrupt When you would take any amount of damage from the villain's attack, discard this card → prevent all of that damage. Change to alter-ego form and draw 2 cards.

name: Element Gun
text: Restricted. Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Element Gun and spend 1 resource of any type → deal 3 damage to an enemy. This attack gains piercing.
real_text: Restricted. Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Element Gun and spend 1 resource of any type → deal 3 damage to an enemy. This attack gains piercing.

name: Jet Boots
text: Star-Lord gains the [[aerial]] trait. Hero Interrupt: When Star-Lord would take any amount of damage, exhaust Jet Boots → prevent 1 of that damage for each facedown encounter card in front of you.
real_text: Star-Lord gains the [[aerial]] trait. Hero Interrupt: When Star-Lord would take any amount of damage, exhaust Jet Boots → prevent 1 of that damage for each facedown encounter card in front of you.

name: Leader of the Guardians
text: Each [[guardian]] character you control gets +1 THW.
real_text: Each [[guardian]] character you control gets +1 THW.
flavor: "I know we all hate each other and we all tried to kill one another. But from now on, and until the job is done, we're Guardians." —Peter Quill

name: Star-Lord's Helmet
text: While you are in hero form, you get +1 hand size for each facedown encounter card in front of you (to a maximum of +3 hand size)
real_text: While you are in hero form, you get +1 hand size for each facedown encounter card in front of you (to a maximum of +3 hand size)
flavor: "You can't see that I'm judging you, but I'm judging you." —Star-Lord

name: Adam Warlock
text: Response: After Adam Warlock attacks or thwarts, discard 1 card at random from your hand. If that card's printed resource has: [physical] – Remove 3 threat from a scheme. [energy] – Heal 3 damage from an identity. [mental] – Deal 3 damage to an enemy. [wild] – Choose one of the above.
real_text: Response: After Adam Warlock attacks or thwarts, discard 1 card at random from your hand. If that card's printed resource has: [physical] – Remove 3 threat from a scheme. [energy] – Heal 3 damage from an identity. [mental] – Deal 3 damage to an enemy. [wild] – Choose one of the above.

name: Beta Ray Bill
text: Response: After Beta Ray Bill attacks and defeats a minion, remove 2 threat from the main scheme.
real_text: Response: After Beta Ray Bill attacks and defeats a minion, remove 2 threat from the main scheme.
flavor: "I may not be a native son of the realm eternal, but the power in my hammer comes from Odin himself. So I fight for Asgard, on this day and all tomorrows!"

name: Yondu
text: [star] Yondu's attacks gain ranged.Ranged attacks ignore retaliate.)
real_text: [star] Yondu's attacks gain ranged.Ranged attacks ignore retaliate.)
flavor: "Don't need no one. I do what I want, when I want, how I want." —Yondu

name: Air Supremacy
text: Hero Action: Choose up to X enemies, where X is equal to the number of [[aerial]] characters you control → deal 3 damage to each chosen enemy.
real_text: Hero Action: Choose up to X enemies, where X is equal to the number of [[aerial]] characters you control → deal 3 damage to each chosen enemy.

name: Blaze of Glory
text: Max 1 per round. Hero Action: Each [[guardian]] character gets +2 THW and +2 ATK this phase. At the end of the phase, deal 1 damage to each [[guardian]] character.
real_text: Max 1 per round. Hero Action: Each [[guardian]] character gets +2 THW and +2 ATK this phase. At the end of the phase, deal 1 damage to each [[guardian]] character.

name: Get Ready
text: Action: Ready an ally.
real_text: Action: Ready an ally.
flavor: "We train hard every day so that when the time comes, we'll be ready." —Steve Rogers

name: Target Practice
text: Interrupt: When an ally with a [[weapon]] attachment upgrade makes an attack, discard Target Practice → that ally gets +2 ATK for that attack.
real_text: Interrupt: When an ally with a [[weapon]] attachment upgrade makes an attack, discard Target Practice → that ally gets +2 ATK for that attack.

name: The Power of Leadership
text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Leadership (blue) card.
real_text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Leadership (blue) card.

name: Laser Blaster
text:
Attach to a [[guardian]] ally. Max 1 per ally.
Attached ally gets +1 ATK and its attacks gain overkill.
real_text:
Attach to a [[guardian]] ally. Max 1 per ally.
Attached ally gets +1 ATK and its attacks gain overkill.

name: Cosmo
text: Interrupt: When Cosmo attacks or thwarts, name a card type, then discard the top card of a player deck or the encounter deck. If that card is of the named type, Cosmo does not take consequential damage for this use.
real_text: Interrupt: When Cosmo attacks or thwarts, name a card type, then discard the top card of a player deck or the encounter deck. If that card is of the named type, Cosmo does not take consequential damage for this use.
errata: Changed “a deck” to “a player deck or the encounter deck”. Removed reminder text. (RRG 1.5)

name: C.I.T.T.
text: Hero Action: Exhaust C.I.T.T. and spend 2 resources of any type → ready a [[guardian]] character.
real_text: Hero Action: Exhaust C.I.T.T. and spend 2 resources of any type → ready a [[guardian]] character.
flavor: "I don't know, I kind of like calling it the Cool Interstellar Travel Travelship." —Peter Quill

name: Knowhere
text: Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait. Increase your ally limit by 1. Response: After a player plays a [[guardian]] ally, exhaust Knowhere → that player draws 1 card.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait. Increase your ally limit by 1. Response: After a player plays a [[guardian]] ally, exhaust Knowhere → that player draws 1 card.

name: Pulse Grenade
text: Hero Action (attack): Discard Pulse Grenade and choose an enemy → discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. Deal 1 damage to the chosen enemy for each boost icon discarded this way.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Discard Pulse Grenade and choose an enemy → discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. Deal 1 damage to the chosen enemy for each boost icon discarded this way.

name: Banishment
text: Give to the Peter Quill player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Peter Quill → remove Banishment from the game. • Discard an Element Gun from play. If you cannot, place 3 threat on the main scheme. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to the Peter Quill player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Peter Quill → remove Banishment from the game. • Discard an Element Gun from play. If you cannot, place 3 threat on the main scheme. Discard this obligation.

name: Budding Crime Syndicate
text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. (When revealed, place 2[per_hero] threat here.)
real_text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. (When revealed, place 2[per_hero] threat here.)
flavor: "In your tiny head, the line between a criminal enterprise and an empire is thin. In reality, nobody cares. All they care about is who holds the gun." —J'son

name: Mister Knife
text: Retaliate 1. The first treachery the engaged player reveals each villain phase gains surge. (Star-Lord's nemesis minion.)
real_text: Retaliate 1. The first treachery the engaged player reveals each villain phase gains surge. (Star-Lord's nemesis minion.)

name: Spartoi Cunning
text: When Revealed: Discard 1 card at random from your hand, take 1 damage, and place 1 threat on the main scheme.
real_text: When Revealed: Discard 1 card at random from your hand, take 1 damage, and place 1 threat on the main scheme.
flavor: "How can you expect to win when the entire galaxy is against you?" —J'son

name: Dive Bomb
text: Play only if your identity has the [[aerial]] trait. Hero Action (attack): Deal 7 damage to an enemy. Deal 1 damage to each other enemy.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[aerial]] trait. Hero Action (attack): Deal 7 damage to an enemy. Deal 1 damage to each other enemy.

name: Agile Flight
text: Play only if your identity has the [[aerial]] trait. Hero Action (thwart): Remove a total of up to 5 threat from among schemes (as you choose).
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[aerial]] trait. Hero Action (thwart): Remove a total of up to 5 threat from among schemes (as you choose).

name: Ever Vigilant
text: Play only if your identity has the [[aerial]] trait. Hero Action: Ready your hero and remove 2 threat from the main scheme.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[aerial]] trait. Hero Action: Ready your hero and remove 2 threat from the main scheme.
flavor: "I feel like I've got the whole weight of the world on my shoulders." —Captain Marvel

name: Enhanced Awareness
text: Uses (3 mental counters). Hero Resource: Exhaust Enhanced Awareness and remove 1 mental counter from it → generate a [mental] resource.
real_text: Uses (3 mental counters). Hero Resource: Exhaust Enhanced Awareness and remove 1 mental counter from it → generate a [mental] resource.
